quiz_history.question: What is the primary purpose of using an array in programming?
quiz_history.answer: To store a collection of values of the same data type

quiz_history.question: What is the primary purpose of using an array in a programming language?
quiz_history.answer: To store a collection of values of the same data type

quiz_history.answer: To store a collection of values of the same data type

quiz_history.question: What is the primary purpose of a base case in a recursive function?
quiz_history.answer: To prevent the function from calling itself indefinitely
